levelList.name: This Is Incorrect
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] Coin Power +1 for every 6 ([Combustion] + [Laceration]) on target (max 2)
[WhenUse] Base Power +1 for every 10 [WitchFactor] on self (max 2)
[WinDuel] Inflict 1 [Rebuttal] (once per turn across all of this unit's basic attack Skills)

levelList.name: Only I Can Correct This World
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] If the ([Combustion] + [Laceration]) on target is above 6, Coin Power +1
[WhenUse] Base Power +1 for every 10 [WitchFactor] on self (max 3)
[WinDuel] Inflict 1 [Rebuttal] (once per turn across all of this unit's basic attack Skills)

coindescs.desc:
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 1 [Laceration] and 1 [Combustion]
[OnSucceedAttack] If target has [Rebuttal], deal Pride damage equal to 50% of this Coin's damage

levelList.name: Die! Die! Die!
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] Gain 5 [WitchFactor]
- If this Skill kills or Staggers the target, gain 20 more [WitchFactor]
[WhenUse] If the ([Combustion] + [Laceration]) on target is above 6, Coin Power +1
[WhenUse] Base Power +1 for every 10 [WitchFactor] on self (max 4)
[WhenUse] If target has [Rebuttal], convert all Coins on this Skill to [SuperCoin]s, and damage +([Rebuttal] x 10)% (max 50%)
[EndSkill] Lose 10 SP

coindescs.desc:
[OnSucceedAttack] Trigger [Combustion] once on target, then reduce its Count by 1
[OnSucceedAttack] Gain 2 [WitchFactor]

levelList.name: Perjury
levelList.flavor: I was sleeping so soundly back then.
levelList.desc:
[StartBattle] Inflict 3 [Rebuttal] on target (once per turn)
[WhenUse] If this unit has no [Rewind] and no [RewindWitch], gain Shield by 50% of Max HP

levelList.name: Clear the Error
levelList.desc:
[Witchization] Negative Coin Skill
At 50+ [Witchization], this Skill gains [CantIdentify]
[WhenUse] Base Power +1 for every 6 ([Combustion] + [Laceration]) on target (max 2)
[WhenUse] Final Power +1 for every 15 [WitchFactor] on self (max 5)
[WhenUse] Lose (5 + [Witchization] / 5) SP (max 7)
[WinDuel] Inflict 1 [Rebuttal] (once per turn across all of this unit's basic attack Skills)

levelList.name: You Are Wrong, I Am Not Evil
levelList.desc:
[Witchization] Negative Coin Skill
At 50+ [Witchization], this Skill gains [CantIdentify]
[WhenUse] Base Power +1 for every 6 ([Combustion] + [Laceration]) on target (max 3)
[WhenUse] Final Power +1 for every 15 [WitchFactor] on self (max 5)
[WhenUse] Lose (5 + [Witchization] / 5) SP (max 10)
[WinDuel] Inflict 1 [Rebuttal] (once per turn across all of this unit's basic attack Skills). If target has [Rebuttal], damage +([Rebuttal] x 10)% (max 30%)

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] If target has [Rebuttal], deal Pride damage equal to 50% of this Coin's damage

levelList.name: Then I Will Kill the Witch
levelList.desc:
[Witchization] Negative Coin Skill
At 50+ [Witchization], this Skill gains [CantIdentify]
[WhenUse] Base Power +1 for every 6 ([Combustion] + [Laceration]) on target (max 4)
[WhenUse] Final Power +1 for every 10 [WitchFactor] on self (max 8)
[WhenUse] Lose (5 + [Witchization] / 5) SP (max 10)
[WhenUse] If target has [Rebuttal], damage +([Rebuttal] x 10)% (max 50%)

coindescs.desc:
[SuperCoin]
[OnSucceedAttack] Trigger [Laceration] once on target, then reduce its Count by 1
[OnSucceedAttack] Gain 2 [WitchFactor]

levelList.name: I Will Save You All
levelList.flavor: While I can still hold on to my sanity... I must turn every last one of them into a witch.
levelList.desc:
[StartBattle] If this unit has less than -20 SP, gain 10 SP
[StartBattle] Inflict 3 [Rebuttal] on target (once per turn)
[WhenUse] Base Power +1 for every 10 [Witchization] on self (max 4)
[EndBattle] Set the SP of 1 other ally to -45 (once per turn). Selects from allies who can corrode and are not currently corroding, prioritizing the rearmost ally in deployment order

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedEvade] Gain 5 SP (max 3 times; cannot raise SP above -10)

levelList.name: This Is Only to Grant You Deliverance
levelList.flavor: Once the Repose Ritual has failed... this alone, I cannot abide... It hurts... I want to be released...
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] Gain 10 [Witchization]. At 50+ [Witchization], damage +1% for each Stack above 50 (max 50%)
[WhenUse] Base Power +1 for every 6 ([Combustion] + [Laceration]) on target (max 4)
[WhenUse] Final Power +1 for every 10 [WitchFactor] on self (max 10)
[WhenUse] Lose (5 + [Witchization] / 5) SP (max 10)

coindescs.desc:
[SuperCoin]
[OnSucceedAttack] Trigger [Laceration] 3 times on target, then reduce its Count by 3

levelList.name: Witch Repose Ritual
levelList.flavor: "Thirteen witches must focus their strongest thoughts upon the Ritual Sword. And then..."
levelList.desc:
This Skill does not trigger Defense Skills
This Skill cannot be reused by external effects
[WhenUse] Consume [RitualSword], damage +100%
[WhenUse] Consume all [Repose] on self, Base Power +1 for each Stack consumed(max 13)
[WhenUse] Final Power +1 for every 10 [WitchFactor] on self (max 10)
[WhenUse] Lose (5 + [Witchization] / 5) SP (max 15, cannot reduce SP below -40)
[EndSkill] Remove [Witchization] from all units; afterwards, this unit can no longer gain [Repose]
[EndSkill] If this unit's SP is below 0, recover it to 0, then recover additional SP equal to the previous difference from 0 (1 SP for each point of difference)

coindescs.desc:
[SuperCoin]
[OnSucceedAttack] Consume all units' [WitchFactor]; deal fixed damage equal to 1% of the target's Max HP for every 10 Stacks consumed (max 50%, each target by its own Max HP)

levelList.name: Clear the Error

[CantIdentify]
[WhenUse] Base Power +1 for every 6 ([Combustion] + [Laceration]) on target (max 2)
